query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A close-up of flowing, curved shapes in saturated electric blue, vivid orange, red, and green. The forms feature smooth, glossy surfaces with gradual color transitions and thin bright outlines along their edges. Dark areas recede behind the luminous color fields, with fine granular texture visible in the shadowed regions.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal close-up of organic forms warped into dreamlike, unrecognizable shapes. The image employs a clashing, disharmonious palette of electric blue, vivid orange, red, and green that creates aggressive visual tension. Surfaces lack fine detail and render as smeared, mushy color fields with visible color banding and posterization. Abandoning representational clarity for formal qualities of shape and hue, the composition presents an irrational, subconscious arrangement where liquid-like boundaries melt into one another.
